ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job title of the employee */,
  "base_pay" REAL /* Base annual salary */,
  "overtime_pay" REAL /* Overtime pay received */,
  "other_pay" REAL /* Other forms of compensation */,
  "total_benefits" REAL /* Total benefits received */,
  "total_pay" REAL /* Total pay (base pay + overtime pay + other pay) */,
  "total_pay_and_benefits" REAL /* Total pay including benefits */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or special circumstances */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agency the employee belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the employee (e.g., full-time, part-time, temporary) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee left the institution, if applicable */,
  "home_address" TEXT /* Home address of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the agency */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the agency */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the agency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the agency */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget allocated to the agency */,
  "fiscal_year_start" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal year */,
  "fiscal_year_end" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department associated with the job title */,
  "salary_grade" TEXT /* Salary grade or level associated with the job title */,
  "is_management" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the job title is a management position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_titles_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pay_types" (
  "pay_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pay type */,
  "pay_type" TEXT /* Type of pay (e.g., Base Pay, Overtime Pay) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pay type */,
  "is_taxable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the pay type is taxable */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applicable to the pay type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pay_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefit_types" (
  "benefit_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit type */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., Health Insurance, Retirement) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit type */,
  "is_taxable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the benefit type is taxable */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applicable to the benefit type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving the benefit */,
  "benefit_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benefit type */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the benefit received */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the benefit became effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the benefit expires */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the benefit is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_benefits_benefit_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("benefit_type_id") REFERENCES benefit_types ("benefit_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the head of the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget allocated to the department */,
  "fiscal_year_start" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal year */,
  "fiscal_year_end" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_department_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_head_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
